The Womens Relaxed Hoodie I got in order ord_048219 is way too small. Do your sizes run small?

Thanks for getting in touch! Our sizing guide is at prettyfly.com/sizing. Generally our pieces are designed for a relaxed fit. Would you like me to connect you with our styling team for specific advice?
I need more help with this please.

For the Womens Relaxed Hoodie, chest is generous (relaxed cut), so if you're say a medium and like a closer fit, small would work. I'm a medium and wear medium in this — it drapes nicely without being baggy.
Lovely, cheers for that.
